raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1183 aims to ensure that vessel operators engaging in reckless behavior are held accountable under law.",
    "Minors can operate vessels under adult supervision, which can lead to dangerous behavior if the supervising adult is under the influence.",
    "The passage of AB 1183 closes a loophole that allows adults to avoid criminal liability when underage, unlicensed individuals operate a vessel.",
    "AB 1662 will add an additional voting member from a California Native American tribe to the Cal NAGPRA Committee, enhancing representation.",
    "The Cal NAGPRA Committee was established to assist Native American tribes in reclaiming ancestral human remains and cultural items.",
    "Repatriation processes can be complex and require significant effort to recover ancestral remains and items."
  ]
}
```
